titles: ETF 시리즈 13편의 결정체 — 평생 쓰는 15가지 규칙 + 실전 포트폴리오 한 장 + 박대리 미래 편지
"깊이 읽는 사람만 10억 만든다" 박대리 ETF 시리즈 총정리 — 같은 월급, 6.7억 차이의 비밀
65살 박대리가 35살 자신에게 쓴 편지 — ETF 시리즈 최종 정답지 (ep14)

character_poses.1: REACT-07 마무리 인사 — 13권의 책 위에서 시리즈 결정체 안내, 따뜻한 인사
character_poses.2: INTRO-07 메모하며 정리 — 빛나는 편지를 쓰며 미래 자신에게 보내는 정리
character_poses.3: REACT-06 기쁨/호재 — 한 장으로 끝낸 10만 자 여정, 환호와 별 반짝임

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 마무리 인사(REACT-07). 좌측 똑똑이가 한 손 흔들고 다른 손에 작은 하트, 따뜻한 미소. 우측에 13권의 가죽 양장본 책이 차곡차곡 쌓여 있고, 그 맨 위에 거대한 빛나는 황금 결정체(크리스털)가 떠올라 황금 빛을 사방으로 발산. 결정체 안에 작은 15개의 빛나는 점. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, warm gentle smile. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot, one paw waving warmly toward the viewer, the other paw holding a small heart shape. On the RIGHT side: a tall stack of thirteen leather-bound books arranged neatly, each spine glowing softly with warm gold accent. Floating just above the top book, a large luminous golden crystal gemstone hovers in the air, radiating brilliant warm light beams in all directions. Inside the crystal, fifteen tiny glowing points of light shimmer like stars. Soft golden lens flare and sparkle particles surround the crystal. Background: deep navy blue gradient with rich golden bokeh sparkles and a powerful warm radial glow behind the crystal. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 메모하며 정리(INTRO-07). 좌측 똑똑이가 작은 클립보드에 연필로 메모하며 살짝 고개 기울임. 우측에 빛나는 황금 편지지 한 장이 떠 있고, 편지지에서 황금 시간 터널이 좌측으로 뻗어 나옴 — 터널 끝에 작은 35 숫자 배지(현재), 편지지 위에 작은 65 숫자 배지(미래). 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, focused studious expression, slight head tilt, holding a small clipboard with one paw and writing notes with a pencil in the other. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot. On the RIGHT side: a glowing handwritten golden letter sheet hovering in mid-air with warm light radiating from it. From the letter, a translucent ribbon of golden time-tunnel light extends leftward toward the skunk with soft sparkle particles flowing along its length. At the far end of the tunnel near the skunk, a small embossed gold age badge displaying 35; on the letter itself, a small embossed gold age badge displaying 65. Background: deep navy blue gradient with rich golden bokeh sparkles and soft radial glow behind the letter. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with introspective gold aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 기쁨/호재(REACT-06). 중앙 똑똑이가 양손 들어 환호, 행복한 큰 미소, 주변 별·반짝이. 한 손에 거대한 황금 한 장의 종이(실전 포트폴리오 한 장 — 작은 파이차트와 곡선 그래프 일러스트). 종이 뒤로 흩어지는 작은 글자 입자들(10만 자 여정의 시각화). 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with happy sparkles, small pink nose, big joyful smile with slightly open mouth. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, full body shot, both paws raised in celebration with small bright stars and sparkle particles scattered around. In one raised paw, a single large glowing golden sheet of paper held high, the sheet illustrated with a small balanced pie chart and a smooth rising line graph in elegant gold and emerald tones. Behind the paper, hundreds of tiny scattered glyph-like particles drift away into the background like dispersing letters, visualizing a long written journey condensed onto one page. Background: deep navy blue gradient with rich golden bokeh sparkles, confetti-like particles, and a powerful warm radial glow behind the skunk. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with celebratory gold aesthetic.
